# MD Feedback
> VS Code extension for reviewing and annotating markdown plans before AI agents implement them.

## What It Does
- Annotate markdown with highlights, fixes, and questions
- Export structured feedback to 11+ AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Cline, Windsurf, Roo Code, Gemini, Antigravity, Generic, Handoff)
- Track review progress with gates, plan cursor, and checkpoints
- Generate session handoff documents for AI agent continuity
- Rich markdown rendering: Mermaid diagrams, callout/admonition blocks, syntax-highlighted code

## MCP Server (12 tools)
- get_document_structure, list_annotations, get_review_status
- update_memo_status, update_cursor, evaluate_gates
- export_review, create_checkpoint, get_checkpoints
- generate_handoff, pickup_handoff
- create_annotation

## Install
VS Code Marketplace: yeominux.md-feedback-vscode

## Links
- Repo: https://github.com/yeominux/md-feedback
- Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=yeominux.md-feedback-vscode
